---
title: '2014/02/01 Journal Sat'
date: '2014-02-01T13:52:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4997034516631859052'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140201-journal-sat.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>VOD<br>
hebrews 13:5 HCSB</p>
<p>Your life should be free from the love of money. Be satisfied with what you have, for He Himself has said, I will never leave you or forsake you.</p>
<p>Thanks for<br>
My home, my family, this smart phone.</p>
<p>Feeling<br>
Full. Full of so many ideas that I don't know what to do next...</p>
<p>What's up?<br>
Mom is back at Ryan's after surgery. Ryan is up and around but still feeling not great. Dad is looking for his next promotion.</p>
<p>I've got an interview on Wed with AAA Insurance. I'm not sure if it's a good idea or a red Herring. </p>
<p>Flavia says she doesn't sleep well if she eats carbs before bed.</p>
<p>Going to work... with dread... it's SO pointless! I'm nearly worthless to their vision. I don't know how much longer I can dig a ditch just to fill it in again. </p>
<p><u>D</u></p>
